contextExports.label: Hologram command
contextExports.description: Shape: {"action":"focus"|"select","target":["sceneId","childId","nodeId"]}. target is a full path — last segment is the node, earlier segments are the cached scene path (omit for the current level, e.g. target:["mha1"]). 'focus' highlights and flies the camera in; 'select' only highlights. Read the loaded scene's valid targets from the 'index' field of the Hologram selection channel. A path whose level isn't loaded retries until you push it via the architecture channel. Legacy {"nodeId","path"} still works.
